generated_oml:
instance FirstAxisPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position sensor for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData FirstAxisPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor for permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance GearTransmissionTorqueSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Torque sensor for gear transmission in MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearTransmissionTorqueDataTransmitted
]

instance FirstAxisPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom FirstAxisPositionSensor
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance GearTransmissionTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearTransmissionTorqueSensor
]

instance FirstAxisPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "MQTT-streamed position data from first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData FirstAxisPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, SysMLEnabler
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "MQTT-streamed current data from permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance GearTransmissionTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "MQTT-streamed torque data from gear transmission"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearTransmissionTorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structural representation of MABI MAX 100 robot using SysML"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance ACMEComponentModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Component and connector model using ACME architecture description language"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACMEEnabler
]

    base:desc "Component and connector model using AADL architecture description language"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AADLEnabler
]

    base:desc "Component and connector model using MontiArc architecture description language"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcEnabler
]

instance SysMLStateMachineModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model using SysML state machines (v1.7)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance MontiArcStateMachineModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model using MontiArc Automaton state machines"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcEnabler
]

instance SimulinkAnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical simulation model using MathWorks Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML-based Model-Based Systems Engineering for system structure and behavior modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService, FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance ACMEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACME Architecture Description Language for component and connector perspectives"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACMEComponentModel
]

instance AADLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL Architecture Description Language for component and connector perspectives"
    DTDFVocab:enables AADLComponentModel
]

instance MontiArcEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Architecture Description Language for component and connector perspectives"
    DTDFVocab:enables MontiArcComponentModel
]

instance RFLPEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RFLP methodology for requirements, functions, logics, and physics"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance OOSEMEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OOSEM methodology for managing complexity"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionLossDetectionService
]

instance SPESEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SPES methodology for system engineering"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance SMArDTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SMArDT methodology for digital twin development"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for detailed behavior modeling and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, FrictionLossDetectionService
]

instance CppEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ programming language for simulation and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance JavaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java programming language for simulation and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for identifying joint friction in robot axes"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionInsight
]

instance FrictionLossDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for detecting friction loss in robot components"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard interface for user interaction with analytical results"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance JointFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of joint friction in MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance FrictionLossInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of friction loss in MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of robot performance metrics"
]

instance MABIMAX100Robot : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Serial robot MABI MAX 100 with six axes for high precision motion control in manufacturing"
]

instance ManufacturingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Manufacturing environment where MABI MAX 100 robot operates"
    base:contains MABIMAX100Robot
]

instance ProblemIdentificationStep : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Step for identifying problems in the digital shadow engineering process"
]

instance AssetModelAnalysisStep : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Step for analyzing assets and models in digital shadow engineering"
]

instance DataIdentificationStep : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Step for identifying data requirements in digital shadow engineering"
]

instance DigitalTwinEngineeringProcessEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment for digital twin engineering process steps"
    base:contains ProblemIdentificationStep, AssetModelAnalysisStep, DataIdentificationStep
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Shadow operates with a one-way data flow from physical assets to digital counterparts, utilizing real-time live measurements and streamed data traces for synchronization, where active components process incoming data to maintain temporal consistency without explicit frequency or latency specifications."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Shadow Reference Model is structured as a UML class diagram defining key concepts (Asset, DataTrace, Processing) and their relationships for manufacturing applications, specifying architecture patterns and component integration for the Digital Twin constellation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is utilized for sensor data transmission; network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external modeling tools including MathWorks Simulink, other simulation tools, and general-purpose programming languages (C++, Java), while addressing heterogeneous modeling notations and stakeholder perspectives as part of MBSE processes."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with industry standards including SysML for model-based systems engineering (MBSE), architecture description languages (ADLs) such as ACME [23], AADL [24], MontiArc [25,26], and SysML IBDs [17,27], methodologies like RFLP [18,19], OOSEM [20], SPES [21], SMArDT [22], simulation tools such as MathWorks Simulink [28], and general-purpose programming languages (e.g., C++, Java). Interoperability is addressed through integration of heterogeneous stakeholders and perspectives [31]."
]
